name: @live-board/desktop
description: 配信者向けローカル完結型リアルタイムペイントワークスペース
author: mizzz-ivr

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @live-board/obs-protocol build && pnpm --filter @live-board/persistence build && pnpm --filter @live-board/overlay build && pnpm --filter @live-board/obs-bridge build && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n renderer,persistence,protocol,bridge,electron-build,electron -c auto "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173" "pnpm --filter @live-board/persistence dev" "pnpm --filter @live-board/obs-protocol dev" "pnpm --filter @live-board/obs-bridge dev" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 file:dist-electron/main.js file:../../packages/persistence/dist/node.js file:../../packages/obs-protocol/dist/index-v4.js file:../../packages/obs-bridge/dist/index.js file:../overlay/dist/index.html && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @live-board/obs-protocol build && pnpm --filter @live-board/persistence build && pnpm --filter @live-board/overlay build && pnpm --filter @live-board/obs-bridge build && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @live-board/obs-protocol build && pnpm --filter @live-board/persistence build && pnpm --filter @live-board/obs-bridge build && vitest run --passWithNoTests
